```{r Mortality Heat Map Stratified by Race for SF Both}
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')\nPatients with SF Contemporary to PF'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality_race_sf_pf_contemp.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Sofa Categories
heat_graph <- heat_map_sofa |>
  filter(
    analysis=='sf_pf',
    strata %in% c('sf_pf_contemp', 'pf'))

ggplot(heat_graph, aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_grid(. ~ black, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(black = "Black", not_black = "Not Black"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(black), ncol = 1) +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')\nPatients with SF Contemporary to PF'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality_race_sf_pf_contemp.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```

```{r Stratified Mortality by Respiratory Support}
#Collate Table Stratified by Respitatory
mortality_by_o2_resp <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_resp_support.csv') |>
  #Fix strange Expanded Strata Name
  mutate(strata = str_remove(strata, "sf_pf_contemp-sf_pf_contemp-sf_pf_contemp-"))

#Prepare Data for Table
aggregate_mortality_resp <- mortality_by_o2_resp |>
  group_by(analysis, strata_type, strata, resp_support_category, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n, na.rm=T),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 

aggregate_mortality_resp  <- aggregate_mortality_resp  |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)

vars <- c(
  'death_hospice28',
  'death_hospice60'
)
mortality_tab_chi <- chisq_function(aggregate_mortality_resp) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c(
  'Overall', 
  'pf-not_hypoxemic',
  'pf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf_pf_-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf_pf_-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf_pf_contemp-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf_pf_contemp-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_contemp-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_contemp-severe_hypoxemia',
  'pf-0',
  'pf-1',
  'pf-2',
  'pf-3',
  'pf-4',
  'sf-0',
  'sf-1',
  'sf-2',
  'sf-3',
  'sf-4',
  'sf_pf_-0',
  'sf_pf_-1',
  'sf_pf_-2',
  'sf_pf_-3',
  'sf_pf_-4',
  'sf_pf_contemp-0',
  'sf_pf_contemp-1',
  'sf_pf_contemp-2',
  'sf_pf_contemp-3',
  'sf_pf_contemp-4'
  )

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table_mortality_resp <- aggregate_mortality_resp |>
  select(analysis, strata_type, strata, resp_support_category, 
         variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  distinct() 

#Keep Long Form Table
table_mortality_long_by_resp <- table_mortality_resp |>
  filter(level==1,
         strata %in% strata_values) |>
  select(-level, -order_number) |>
  left_join(mortality_tab_chi)

#Pivot Wider
table_mortality_resp <- table_mortality_resp |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
    relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                         paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
  }

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table_mortality_resp <- table_mortality_resp |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(tab1_chi, by=c('variable')) |>
  filter(level==1)
stratified_keep <- table_mortality_resp |>
  select(resp_support_category, variable, Overall_n_total, analysis, strata_type) |>
  distinct()

table_mortality_resp <- readable_table(table_mortality_resp, strata_values, has_continuous=F, has_categorical=T) |>
  left_join(stratified_keep) |>
  relocate(analysis, strata_type, resp_support_category, .before=variable)

write_csv(table_mortality_resp, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_mortality_resp_support.csv'))
write_csv(table_mortality_long_by_resp, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_mortality_resp_support_long.csv'))
```


```{r Heat Map with Mortality by Respiratory Support}
heat_map_o2_mortality <- aggregate_mortality_resp %>%
  filter(strata %in% strata_values,
         strata!='Overall',
         level==1) |> #Only Need 1 Level) 
  mutate(label = paste0(percent(percent, accuracy = 0.1))) |>
  separate(strata, into = c("strata","level"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE)

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
rn <- data.frame(
  level=cat_levels
) |>
  mutate(
    rn=dplyr::row_number()
  )
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==T,
    analysis=='overall') |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, 
                   levels = cat_levels),
    resp_support_category  = factor(resp_support_category, 
                                    levels = c("high_flow_nc", "imv", "nippv"))
) |>
group_by(resp_support_category) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup() |>
  filter(percent!='NA') |>
  left_join(rn, by='level') |>
  arrange(rn) 

p_imv <- heat_map_o2_cat %>% 
  filter(resp_support_category == "imv") %>%
  arrange(rn) |> #THis was Fix to Get the Order of the Categories Right
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\n', 'Moderate\n', 'Severe\n')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("IMV (n=", sum(heat_map_o2_cat$n_total[heat_map_o2_cat$resp_support_category=='imv'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_hifnc <- heat_map_o2_cat %>% 
  filter(resp_support_category == "high_flow_nc") %>%
  arrange(rn) |> #THis was Fix to Get the Order of the Categories Right
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\n', 'Moderate\n', 'Severe\n')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("HIFNC (n=", sum(heat_map_o2_cat$n_total[heat_map_o2_cat$resp_support_category=='high_flow_nc'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_nippv <- heat_map_o2_cat %>% 
  filter(resp_support_category == "nippv") %>%
  arrange(rn) |> #THis was Fix to Get the Order of the Categories Right
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='Hypoxemia Severity Category',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\n', 'Moderate\n', 'Severe\n')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("NIPPV (n=", sum(heat_map_o2_cat$n_total[heat_map_o2_cat$resp_support_category=='nippv'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )


# Arrange: 
(p_imv / p_hifnc/ p_nippv)  +
  plot_layout(guides = 'collect')
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality_resp_support.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  height=12,
  width=8,
  units='in')

#Order Sofa Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
rn <- data.frame(
  level=cat_levels
) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number())
heat_map_sofa <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==F) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
    resp_support_category  = factor(resp_support_category, 
                                    levels = c("high_flow_nc", "imv", "nippv"))
) |>
group_by(resp_support_category) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup() |>
  filter(percent!='NA') |>
arrange(level) |>
left_join(rn, by='level')

heat_graph <- heat_map_sofa |>
  filter(analysis=='overall')
# Create individual plots for each facet
p_imv <- heat_graph %>% filter(resp_support_category == "imv") %>%
  arrange(rn) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='', labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("IMV (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='imv'], na.rm=T), ')'), size=3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_hifnc <- heat_graph %>% filter(resp_support_category == "high_flow_nc") %>%
  arrange(rn) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='', labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("HIFNC (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='high_flow_nc'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_nippv <- heat_graph %>% filter(resp_support_category == "nippv") %>%
  arrange(rn) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Score', labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("NIPPV (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='nippv'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Arrange: 2 on top, 1 centered below
(p_imv / p_hifnc/ p_nippv)  +
  plot_layout(guides = 'collect')

ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality_resp.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  height=12,
  width=8,
  units='in')

```


```{r Repeat Respiratory Stratified Heat Map with SF Both}
#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
rn <- data.frame(
  level=cat_levels
) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number())
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==T) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
    resp_support_category  = factor(resp_support_category, 
                                    levels = c("high_flow_nc", "imv", "nippv"))
) |>
group_by(resp_support_category) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup() |>
  filter(percent!='NA') |>
left_join(rn, by='level')

heat_graph <- heat_map_o2_cat |>
  filter(
    analysis=='sf_pf',
    strata %in% c('sf_pf_', 'pf'))
p_imv <- heat_graph %>% 
  filter(resp_support_category == "imv") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\n', 'Moderate\n', 'Severe\n')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("IMV (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='imv' & heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_hifnc <- heat_graph %>% 
  filter(resp_support_category == "high_flow_nc") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\n', 'Moderate\n', 'Severe\n')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("HIFNC (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='high_flow_nc' & heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_nippv <- heat_graph %>% 
  filter(resp_support_category == "nippv") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='Hypoxemia Severity Category',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\n', 'Moderate\n', 'Severe\n')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("NIPPV (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='nippv' & heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )


# Arrange: 2 on top, 1 centered below
(p_imv / p_hifnc/ p_nippv)  +
  plot_layout(guides = 'collect')
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality_resp_support_sf_pf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  height=12,
  width=8,
  units='in')

#Order Sofa Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
rn <- data.frame(
  level=cat_levels
) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number())
heat_map_sofa <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==F) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
    resp_support_category  = factor(resp_support_category, 
                                    levels = c("high_flow_nc", "imv", "nippv"))
) |>
group_by(resp_support_category) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup() |>
  filter(percent!='NA') |>
  left_join(rn, by='level')

heat_graph <- heat_map_sofa |>
  filter(
    analysis=='sf_pf',
    strata %in% c('sf_pf_', 'pf'))

# Create individual plots for each facet
p_imv <- heat_graph %>% filter(resp_support_category == "imv") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='', labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("IMV (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='imv' & heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')'), size=3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_hifnc <- heat_graph %>% filter(resp_support_category == "high_flow_nc") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='', labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("HIFNC (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='high_flow_nc'  &
                                                            heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

p_nippv <- heat_graph %>% filter(resp_support_category == "nippv") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
                       low = 'dodgerblue4', mid = 'white', high = 'firebrick2',
                       limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
                       breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
                       labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Score', labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(title = paste0("NIPPV (n=", sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$resp_support_category=='nippv' &
                                                            heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Arrange: 2 on top, 1 centered below
(p_imv / p_hifnc/ p_nippv)  +
  plot_layout(guides = 'collect')
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality_resp_sf_pf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'),
   device=cairo_pdf(),
  height=12,
  width=8,
  units='in')

#####
# Repeat for SF Contemp to PF
####
heat_graph <- heat_map_o2_cat |>
  filter(
    analysis=='sf_pf',
    strata %in% c('sf_pf_contemp', 'pf'))
ggplot(heat_graph, aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_grid(. ~ resp_support_category, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(imv = "IMV", high_flow_nc = "HIFNC", nippv="NIPPV"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(resp_support_category), ncol=2) +
labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')\nPatients with SF Contemporary to PF'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality_resp_support_sf_p_contemp.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

heat_graph <- heat_map_sofa |>
  filter(
    analysis=='sf_pf',
    strata %in% c('sf_pf_contemp', 'pf'))
ggplot(heat_graph, aes(x = rn, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_grid(. ~ resp_support_category, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(imv = "IMV", high_flow_nc = "HIFNC", nippv="NIPPV"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(resp_support_category), ncol=2) +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total[heat_graph$strata=='pf'], na.rm=T), ')\nPatients with SF Contemporary to PF'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality_resp_sf_pf_contemp.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```

```{r Summarise RespSupport Free Days by Oxygenation Category}
rsfds_o2_cat <- collate_tables('_table1_cont_by_oxygenation.csv') |>
  filter(variable=='resp_support_free_days28')
rsfds_sofa <- collate_tables('_table1_cont_by_sofa2.csv') |>
  filter(variable=='resp_support_free_days28')
  
rsfds_o2_working <- cont_table_function(rsfds_o2_cat)
group_p_values <- weighted_anova_pval(rsfds_o2_working)

rsfds_o2_cat <- rsfds_o2_working |>
  left_join(group_p_values, by='variable') |>
  select(strata, variable, weighted_mean, weighted_sd, f_stat, p.value, overall_n) |>
  distinct()

median_summary <- rsfds_o2_working |>
  summarise(
    median_medians=median(median, na.rm=T),
    median_range=paste0(range(median, na.rm=T)[1],'-',range(median, na.rm=T)[2]),
    p25_range=paste0(range(p25, na.rm=T)[1],'-',range(p25, na.rm=T)[2]),
    p75_range=paste0(range(p75, na.rm=T)[1],'-',range(p75, na.rm=T)[2]),
    .by = c('strata')
  )

rsfds_o2_cat <- rsfds_o2_cat |>
  left_join(median_summary, by='strata') |>
  mutate(
    rn=fcase(
      strata=='Overall', 1,
      strata=='not_hypoxemic', 2,
      strata=='mild_hypoxemia',4,
      strata=='moderate_hypoxemia', 5,
      strata=='severe_hypoxemia', 5,
      strata=='undefined', 6
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(rn)
write_csv(rsfds_o2_cat, paste0(project_location, '/tables/rsfds_o2_cat.csv'))
rm(rsfds_o2_working)

  
rsfds_sofa_working <- cont_table_function(rsfds_sofa)
group_p_values <- weighted_anova_pval(rsfds_sofa_working)

rsfds_sofa <- rsfds_sofa_working |>
  left_join(group_p_values, by='variable') |>
  select(strata, variable, weighted_mean, weighted_sd, f_stat, p.value, overall_n) |>
  distinct()

median_summary <- rsfds_sofa_working |>
  summarise(
    median_medians=median(median, na.rm=T),
    median_range=paste0(range(median, na.rm=T)[1],'-',range(median, na.rm=T)[2]),
    p25_range=paste0(range(p25, na.rm=T)[1],'-',range(p25, na.rm=T)[2]),
    p75_range=paste0(range(p75, na.rm=T)[1],'-',range(p75, na.rm=T)[2]),
    .by = c('strata')
  )

rsfds_sofa <- rsfds_sofa |>
  left_join(median_summary, by='strata') |>
  mutate(
    rn=fcase(
      strata=='Overall', 0,
      strata=='0', 1,
      strata=='1',2,
      strata=='2', 3,
      strata=='3', 4,
      strata=='5', 6
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(rn)
rm(median_summary)
write_csv(rsfds_sofa, paste0(project_location, '/tables/rsfds_sofa.csv'))
rm(rsfds_sofa)
```



```{r Function for Calculating Logistic Mixed ICC}
icc_manual <- function(model, cluster_col = "site") {
vc <- VarCorr(model)
if (is.null(vc$cond)) stop("No conditional VarCorr found in model")
vc_cond <- vc$cond
if (!cluster_col %in% names(vc_cond)) {
stop("Cluster column '", cluster_col, "' not found in VarCorr(model)$cond. Available: ",
paste(names(vc_cond), collapse = ", "))
}
sigma2_u <- as.numeric(vc_cond[[cluster_col]][1])
icc <- sigma2_u / (sigma2_u + (pi^2 / 3))
round(icc, 4)
}
```


```{r Function for glmmTMB Tidyier}
tidy_make <- function(mod, name, cluster_col='site') {
  fixed <- broom.mixed::tidy(
    mod,
    effects = c("fixed"),
    component = "cond",
    conf.int = TRUE,
    exponentiate = TRUE
  )

  ranpars <- broom.mixed::tidy(
    mod,
    effects = "ran_pars",
    component = "cond",
    conf.int = TRUE,
    exponentiate = FALSE
  )

  dplyr::bind_rows(fixed, ranpars) |>
    dplyr::mutate(model = name) |>
    dplyr::relocate(model, .before = effect) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      icc=fifelse(effect=='ran_pars', icc_manual(mod, cluster_col), NA_real_)
    )
}

```



```{r Now Evaluate Discrimination by Fitting Logistic Regression - Contnuous Measure}
tidy_models_list <- list()

#Include Cubic Spline Terms with 4 Knots
aggregate_continuous_hospital <-  collate_tables("_aggregate_outcomes.csv") |>
  filter(!is.na(hospital_id)) |>
  mutate(
    prob_death28=n_deathhosp28/n_in_group,
    prob_death60=n_deathhosp60/n_in_group) |>
  #Bring in ABG and Hospital Data
  left_join(abgs_by_hospital, by=c('site', 'hospital_id'))

##################
### PF Ratio
#################

#Evaluate Shape of Relationship Using Smoothing Term
#First FOr Lowest Value in 1st 24 Hours
ggplot(data=
         subset(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                primary_metric=='pf' & variable=='measure_value_5'), 
       aes(x=value, y=prob_death28)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
ggsave(
  filename='lowest_pf_deathhospice28_raw.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Now Median Value in 1st 24 Hours
ggplot(data=
         subset(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                primary_metric=='pf' & variable=='median_measure_5'), 
       aes(x=value, y=prob_death28)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
ggsave(
  filename='median_pf_deathhospice28_raw.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Run Random Effects Aggregate Logistic Regression for Death/Hospice by Day 28
#Note Proportion with Weights Gives Equivalent Results to the cbind method
#Start with Univariable and Hospital Random Effect
pf_glm_linear <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    rms::rcs(value, 4) + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(aggregate_continuous_hospital,
                       primary_metric == "pf",
                       variable == "measure_value_5"),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)

tidy_models_list[['pf_only']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_linear, "PF Ratio - Continuous")

pf_glm_median <- glmmTMB(
 cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    rms::rcs(value, 4) + (1 | site),
data   = dplyr::filter(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                       primary_metric == "pf" & 
                       variable=='median_measure_5'),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['pf_median']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_linear, "Median PF - Continuous")

#Visualize COntinuous Lowest Measure
grid <- aggregate_continuous_hospital |>
  filter(primary_metric=='pf',
         variable=='measure_value_5') |>
  group_by(value) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  )
predicted_pf <- as_tibble(predictions(pf_glm_linear, new_data=grid, re.form=NA)) |>
  select(value, n_in_group, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  group_by(value) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  distinct()

ggplot(predicted_pf, aes(x = value, y = estimate)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick2", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_in_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 2), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = "Lowest PaO2/FiO2",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       title = "Predicted probability with 95% CI band") +
theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='predicted_deathhospice28_pf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Median
grid <- aggregate_continuous_hospital |>
  filter(primary_metric=='pf',
         variable=='median_measure_5') |>
  group_by(value) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  )
predicted_pf_median <- as_tibble(predictions(pf_glm_median, new_data=grid, re.form=NA)) |>
  select(value, n_in_group, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  group_by(value) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  distinct()

ggplot(predicted_pf_median, aes(x = value, y = estimate)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick2", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_in_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 2), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = "Median PaO2/FiO2",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       title = "Predicted probability with 95% CI band") +
theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='predicted_deathhospice28_pf_median.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

##################
### SF Ratio
#################

#Evaluate Shape of Relationship Using Smoothing Term
ggplot(data=
         subset(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                primary_metric=='sf' & variable=='measure_value_5'), 
       aes(x=value, y=prob_death28)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
ggsave(
  filename='lowest_sf_deathhospice28_raw.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

ggplot(data=
         subset(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                primary_metric=='sf' & variable=='median_measure_5'), 
       aes(x=value, y=prob_death28)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()
ggsave(
  filename='median_sf_deathhospice28_raw.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Run Random Effects Aggregate Logistic Regression for Death/Hospice by Day 28
sf_glm_linear <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    rms::rcs(value, 4) + (1 | site),
data   = dplyr::filter(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                       primary_metric == "sf" &
                       variable=='measure_value_5'),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list$sf_only <- tidy_make(sf_glm_linear, 'SF-Continuous')


#Now Median
sf_glm_median <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    rms::rcs(value, 4) + (1 | site),
data   = dplyr::filter(aggregate_continuous_hospital, 
                       primary_metric == "sf" &
                       variable=='median_measure_5'),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list$sf_median <- tidy_make(sf_glm_median, 'SF_Median_Continuous')

#Visualize SF Lowest
grid <- aggregate_continuous_hospital |>
  filter(primary_metric=='sf',
         variable=='measure_value_5') |>
  group_by(value) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  )
predicted_sf <- as_tibble(predictions(sf_glm_linear, new_data=grid, re.form=NA)) |>
  select(value, n_in_group, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  group_by(value) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  distinct()

ggplot(predicted_sf, aes(x = value, y = estimate)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick2", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_in_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = "Lowest SpO2/FiO2",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       title = "Predicted probability with 95% CI band") +
theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename='predicted_deathhospice28_sf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Visualize SF Median
grid <- aggregate_continuous_hospital |>
  filter(primary_metric=='sf',
         variable=='median_measure_5') |>
  group_by(value) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  )
predicted_sf_median <- as_tibble(predictions(sf_glm_median, new_data=grid, re.form=NA)) |>
  select(value, n_in_group, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  group_by(value) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  distinct()

ggplot(predicted_sf_median, aes(x = value, y = estimate)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick2", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_in_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = "Median SpO2/FiO2",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       title = "Predicted probability with 95% CI band") +
theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename='predicted_deathhospice28_sf_median.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```

```{r Function for Computing Weighted Brier Score From Summary Data}
#Samples Bootstrap by Hospital for Clustered Boostrap
compute_weighted_brier <- function(df, 
                                   cluster_col = "hospital_id",
                                   boot_n = 2000, 
                                   seed = NULL) {
  
  if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  
  
  # Validate inputs
  df <- df[is.finite(df$pred) & df$pred >= 0 & df$pred <= 1, , drop = FALSE]
  df$deaths    <- as.integer(df$deaths)
  df$survivors <- as.integer(df$survivors)
  
  if (!cluster_col %in% names(df)) {
    stop("cluster_col '", cluster_col, "' not found in df")
  }
  
  
  # Point estimate
  N_tot <- sum(df$deaths + df$survivors, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (N_tot == 0) return(list(value = NA_real_, ci = c(NA_real_, NA_real_)))
  brier_val <- (sum(df$deaths * (1 - df$pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE) +
                  sum(df$survivors * df$pred^2,    na.rm = TRUE)) / N_tot
  
  # Cluster bootstrap
  clusters <- unique(df[[cluster_col]])
  n_clusters <- length(clusters)
  
  # Pre-split data by cluster for speed
  df_by_cluster <- split(df, df[[cluster_col]])
  
  brier_boot <- numeric(boot_n)
  
  for (b in seq_len(boot_n)) {
    # Resample clusters with replacement
    samp_clusters <- sample(clusters, n_clusters, replace = TRUE)
    
    # Combine resampled cluster data
    df_b <- do.call(rbind, df_by_cluster[samp_clusters])
    
    N_b <- sum(df_b$deaths + df_b$survivors, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    brier_boot[b] <- (sum(df_b$deaths * (1 - df_b$pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE) +
                        sum(df_b$survivors * df_b$pred^2,    na.rm = TRUE)) / N_b
  }
  
  
  # Output
  
  list(
    value      = brier_val,
    ci         = as.numeric(quantile(brier_boot, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_clusters = n_clusters,
    n_total    = N_tot
  )
}
```


```{r Function to Expand to One Row Per Patient with Predictions}
expand_to_patients <- function(df) {
  # Determine which column exists: 'value' or 'strata'
  if ("value" %in% names(df)) {
    group_col <- "value"
  } else if ("strata" %in% names(df)) {
    group_col <- "strata"
  } else {
    group_col <- NULL
  }
 
  # Build list of columns to select
  base_cols <- c("site", "pred")
  if (!is.null(group_col)) {
    select_cols <- c(base_cols, group_col)
  } else {
    select_cols <- base_cols
  }
 
  deaths_df <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(deaths > 0) |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(select_cols), n = deaths) |>
    dplyr::mutate(label = 1L)
 
  survivors_df <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(survivors > 0) |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(select_cols), n = survivors) |>
    dplyr::mutate(label = 0L)
 
  dplyr::bind_rows(deaths_df, survivors_df) |>
    tidyr::uncount(weights = n) |>
    dplyr::rename(score = pred)
}
```

```{r Compute Clustered Integrated Calibration Index}
bootstrap_val_prob_clustered <- function(df, 
                                         cluster_col = "site",
                                         n_boot = 2500, 
                                         seed = 123) {
  
  set.seed(seed)
  
  # Point estimate
  val <- val.prob(df$score, df$label, smooth = TRUE, pl = FALSE)
  eavg_point <- val['Eavg']
  
  cat(sprintf("E_avg: %.4f\n", eavg_point))
  
  # Get clusters
  clusters <- unique(df[[cluster_col]])
  n_clusters <- length(clusters)
  cat(sprintf("Bootstrapping %d iterations (%d clusters)...\n", n_boot, n_clusters))
  
  # Split by cluster
  df_by_cluster <- split(df, df[[cluster_col]])
  
  eavg_boot <- numeric(n_boot)
  
  for (b in 1:n_boot) {
    # Resample clusters
    samp_clusters <- sample(clusters, n_clusters, replace = TRUE)
    df_b <- do.call(rbind, df_by_cluster[samp_clusters])
    
    tryCatch({
      val_b <- val.prob(df_b$score, df_b$label, smooth = TRUE, pl = FALSE)
      eavg_boot[b] <- val_b['Eavg']
    }, error = function(e) {
      eavg_boot[b] <- NA_real_
    })
    
    if (b %% 500 == 0) cat(sprintf("  %d/%d\n", b, n_boot))
  }
  
  
  median <- median(eavg_boot, na.rm=T)
  ci <- quantile(eavg_boot, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
  
  cat(sprintf("\nE_avg: %.4f [%.4f, %.4f]\n", eavg_point, ci[1], ci[2]))
  
  list(
    eavg = median,
    ci_lower = ci[1],
    ci_upper = ci[2],
    boot_values = eavg_boot,
    n_clusters = n_clusters
  )
}
```


```{r AUROC and ROC Curves - Continuous Measures}
roc_table <- data.frame()

set.seed(3982)
BOOT_NUM <- 2500 #Number of Bootstrap Replicates
#SF Ratio
dat_sf <- aggregate_continuous_hospital %>%
  filter(primary_metric=='sf',
         variable=='measure_value_5') 
dat_sf <- dat_sf |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_glm_linear, newdata = dat_sf, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf <-expand_to_patients(dat_sf)

roc_sf <- roc(response = roc_df_sf$label, predictor = roc_df_sf$score)
auc_sf <- auc(roc_sf)
ci_sf <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf <- compute_weighted_brier(
  df=dat_sf,
  cluster_col = "hospital_id",
  boot_n      = BOOT_NUM,
  seed        = 42)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf)

roc_table <- data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SF_Ratio_Linear",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = NA_character_,
  p.value = NA_real_
)
rm(roc_sf_df)

#PF Ratio
dat_pf <- aggregate_continuous_hospital %>%
  filter(primary_metric=='pf',
         variable == 'measure_value_5') 
dat_pf <- dat_pf |>
  mutate(pred = predict(pf_glm_linear, newdata = dat_pf, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_pf <- expand_to_patients(dat_pf)

roc_pf <- roc(response = roc_df_pf$label, predictor = roc_df_pf$score)
auc_pf <- auc(roc_pf)
ci_pf <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_pf, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_pf <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_pf, cluster_col = "site",
  boot_n      = BOOT_NUM,
  seed        = 42)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_pf)
test <- roc.test(roc_pf, roc_sf, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
    model = "Overall_PF_Ratio_Linear",
    model_n_patients = dat_pf$model_n[1],
    model_n_hospitals = dat_pf$model_hospitals[1],
    auc = round(auc_pf, 3),
    ci_low = round(ci_pf[1], 3),
    ci_hi = round(ci_pf[3], 3),
    brier       = round(brier_pf$value, 3),
    brier_low   = round(brier_pf$ci[1], 3),
    brier_hi    = round(brier_pf$ci[2], 3),
    ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
    ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
    ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
    comparison = "Overall_PFvSF_Linear",
    p.value = test$p.value
  )
) |>
  arrange(model, comparison)
rm(roc_df_pf)
```


```{r  AUROC and ROC Curves - Continuous Medians}
set.seed(3982)
BOOT_NUM <- 2500 #Number of Bootstrap Replicates
#SF Ratio
dat_sf_median <- aggregate_continuous_hospital %>%
  filter(primary_metric=='sf',
         variable=='median_measure_5') 
dat_sf_median <- dat_sf_median |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_glm_median, newdata = dat_sf_median, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_median <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_median)

roc_sf_median <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_median$label, predictor = roc_df_sf_median$score)
auc_sf_median <- auc(roc_sf_median)
ci_sf_median <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_median, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_median <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_median, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_median)
test <- roc.test(roc_sf, roc_sf_median, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SF_Ratio_Median",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_median$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_median$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_median, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_median[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_median[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_median$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_median$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_median$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "Overall_SF_Lowest_v_Median",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_sf_median)

#PF Ratio Median
dat_pf_median <- aggregate_continuous_hospital %>%
  filter(primary_metric=='pf',
         variable == 'median_measure_5') 
dat_pf_median <- dat_pf_median |>
  mutate(pred = predict(pf_glm_median, newdata = dat_pf_median, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_pf <- expand_to_patients(dat_pf_median)

roc_pf <- roc(response = roc_df_pf$label, predictor = roc_df_pf$score)
auc_pf <- auc(roc_pf)
ci_pf <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_pf, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_pf <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_pf_median, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_pf)


roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
    model = "Overall_PF_Ratio_Median",
    model_n_patients = dat_pf_median$model_n[1],
    model_n_hospitals = dat_pf_median$model_hospitals[1],
    auc = round(auc_pf, 3),
    ci_low = round(ci_pf[1], 3),
    ci_hi = round(ci_pf[3], 3),
    brier       = round(brier_pf$value, 3),
    brier_low   = round(brier_pf$ci[1], 3),
    brier_hi    = round(brier_pf$ci[2], 3),
    ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
    ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
    ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
    comparison = NA_character_,
    p.value = NA_real_
  )
) |>
  arrange(model, comparison)
rm(roc_df_pf)
```
 

```{r Logistic Models Using SF or PF Derived Categorical Classifications}
#Create Vectors of PF, SF and SF_PF derived measures
pf_o2_cat <- paste0('pf-', c('not_hypoxemic', 'mild_hypoxemia', 'moderate_hypoxemia', 'severe_hypoxemia'))
sf_o2_cat <- paste0('sf-', c('not_hypoxemic', 'mild_hypoxemia', 'moderate_hypoxemia', 'severe_hypoxemia'))
pf_sofa <- paste0('pf-', c(0:4))
sf_sofa <- paste0('sf-', c(0:4))
#SF_PF Vectors
sf_pf_o2_cat <- paste0('sf_pf_-', c('not_hypoxemic', 'mild_hypoxemia', 'moderate_hypoxemia', 'severe_hypoxemia'))
sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- paste0('sf_pf_contemp-', c('not_hypoxemic', 'mild_hypoxemia', 'moderate_hypoxemia', 'severe_hypoxemia'))
sf_pf_sofa <- paste0('sf_pf_-', c(0:4))
sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- paste0('sf_pf_contemp-', c(0:4))

aggregate_mortality_hospital <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_hospital.csv') |>
  filter(!is.na(hospital_id),
         level==1,
         variable=='death_hospice28') |>
  rename(
    n_deathhosp28=freq,
    n_in_group=n) |>
  mutate(
    prob_death28=n_deathhosp28/n_in_group) |>
  #Bring in ABG and Hospital Data
  left_join(abgs_by_hospital, by=c('site', 'hospital_id'))

##PF RATIO MODELS 
#Categorical
pf_glm_o2_cat <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in%  pf_o2_cat,
                analysis=='overall') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = pf_o2_cat, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['pf_o2_cat']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_o2_cat, "PF - O2Cat")


#SOFA
pf_glm_sofa_cat <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in%  pf_sofa,
                analysis=='overall') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = pf_sofa, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

tidy_models_list[['pf_sofa_cat']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_sofa_cat, "PF - SOFA")

#SF RATIO MODELS 
#SF Categories
sf_glm_o2_cat <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in%  sf_o2_cat,
                analysis == 'overall') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = sf_o2_cat, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['sf_o2_cat']] <- tidy_make(sf_glm_o2_cat, "SF - O2Cat")


#SF SOFA
#SOFA
sf_glm_sofa_cat <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in%  sf_sofa,
                analysis=='overall') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = sf_sofa, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['sf_sofa']] <- tidy_make(sf_glm_sofa_cat, "SF - SOFA")

#SF_and_PF O2 Cat
sf_pf_glm_cat <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~  strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in%  sf_pf_o2_cat,
                analysis=='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = sf_pf_o2_cat, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['sf_pf_o2cat']] <- tidy_make(sf_pf_glm_cat, "SF_PF - O2Cat")


#SF_PF_Categorical: Contemporaneously Measured
sf_pf_glm_cat_contemp <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in% sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat,
                analysis=='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['sf_pf_o2cat_contemp']] <- 
  tidy_make(sf_pf_glm_cat_contemp, "SF_PF_Contemp - O2Cat")

#SF_PF_SOFA: Both Measured - Lowest of Each
sf_pf_glm_sofa <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in% sf_pf_sofa,
                analysis=='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = sf_pf_sofa, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

tidy_models_list[['sf_pf_sofa']] <- 
  tidy_make(sf_pf_glm_sofa, "SF_PF - SOFA")

#SF_PF_SOFA: Contemporaneously Measured
sf_pf_glm_sofa_contemp <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ strata + (1 | site),
data   = aggregate_mortality_hospital |> 
  dplyr::filter(strata %in% sf_pf_sofa_contemp,
                analysis=='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(strata = factor(strata, levels = sf_pf_sofa_contemp, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list[['sf_pf_sofa_contemp']] <- 
  tidy_make(sf_pf_glm_sofa_contemp, "SF_PF_Contemp - SOFA")
```

```{r ROC Analysis for the Categorical Exposure}
set.seed(3982)
BOOT_NUM <- 2500 #Number of Bootstrap Replicates

#SF Ratio O2 Cat
dat_sf_o2_cat <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% sf_o2_cat,
         analysis=='overall') |>
  distinct()
dat_sf_o2_cat <- dat_sf_o2_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_glm_o2_cat, newdata = dat_sf_o2_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_o2_cat <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_o2_cat)

roc_sf_o2_cat <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_o2_cat$label, predictor = roc_df_sf_o2_cat$score)
auc_sf_o2_cat <- auc(roc_sf_o2_cat)
ci_sf_o2_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_o2_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_o2_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_o2_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_o2_cat)
#test <- roc.test(roc_sf, roc_sf_median, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SF_O2_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_o2_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_o2_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_o2_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_o2_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_o2_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_o2_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_o2_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_o2_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = NA_character_,
  p.value = NA_real_
))
rm(roc_df_sf_o2_cat)

#PF O2 Cat
dat_pf_o2_cat <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% pf_o2_cat,
         analysis=='overall') 
dat_pf_o2_cat <- dat_pf_o2_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(pf_glm_o2_cat, newdata = dat_pf_o2_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_pf_o2_cat <- expand_to_patients(dat_pf_o2_cat)

roc_pf_o2_cat <- roc(response = roc_df_pf_o2_cat$label, predictor = roc_df_pf_o2_cat$score)
auc_pf_o2_cat <- auc(roc_pf_o2_cat)
ci_pf_o2_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_pf_o2_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_pf_o2_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_pf_o2_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_pf_o2_cat)
test <- roc.test(roc_pf_o2_cat, roc_sf_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_PF_O2_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_pf_o2_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_pf_o2_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_pf_o2_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_pf_o2_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_pf_o2_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_pf_o2_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_pf_o2_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_pf_o2_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "PF vs SF: O2Cat Exposure",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_pf_o2_cat)

#SF SOFA Category
dat_sf_sofa_cat <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% sf_sofa,
         analysis=='overall') 
dat_sf_sofa_cat <- dat_sf_sofa_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_glm_sofa_cat, newdata = dat_sf_sofa_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_sofa_cat <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_sofa_cat)

roc_sf_sofa_cat <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_sofa_cat$label, 
                       predictor = roc_df_sf_sofa_cat$score)
auc_sf_sofa_cat <- auc(roc_sf_sofa_cat)
ci_sf_sofa_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_sofa_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_sofa_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_sofa_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_sofa_cat)

#test <- roc.test(roc_sf, roc_sf_median, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SF_SOFA_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_sofa_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_sofa_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_sofa_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_sofa_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_sofa_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_sofa_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_sofa_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_sofa_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = NA_character_,
  p.value = NA_real_
))
rm(roc_df_sf_sofa_cat)

#PF SOFA Cat
dat_pf_sofa_cat <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% pf_sofa,
         analysis=='overall') 
dat_pf_sofa_cat <- dat_pf_sofa_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(pf_glm_sofa_cat, newdata = dat_pf_sofa_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
           model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_pf_sofa_cat <- expand_to_patients(dat_pf_sofa_cat)

roc_pf_sofa_cat <- roc(response = roc_df_pf_sofa_cat$label, 
                       predictor = roc_df_pf_sofa_cat$score)
auc_pf_sofa_cat <- auc(roc_pf_sofa_cat)
ci_pf_sofa_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_pf_sofa_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_pf_sofa_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_pf_sofa_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_pf_sofa_cat)
test <- roc.test(roc_pf_sofa_cat, roc_sf_sofa_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_PF_SOFA_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_pf_sofa_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_pf_sofa_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_pf_sofa_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_pf_sofa_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_pf_sofa_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_pf_sofa_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_pf_sofa_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_pf_sofa_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "PF_vs_SF SOFA Comparison",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_pf_sofa_cat)

#BOth SF and PF Available 
#SF O2 Cat
#SF Ratio O2 Cat
dat_sf_pf_o2_cat <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% sf_pf_o2_cat,
         analysis=='sf_pf') 
dat_sf_pf_o2_cat <- dat_sf_pf_o2_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_pf_glm_cat, newdata = dat_sf_pf_o2_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_pf_o2_cat <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_pf_o2_cat)

roc_sf_pf_o2_cat <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_pf_o2_cat$label, 
                        predictor = roc_df_sf_pf_o2_cat$score)
auc_sf_pf_o2_cat <- auc(roc_sf_pf_o2_cat)
ci_sf_pf_o2_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_pf_o2_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_pf_o2_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_pf_o2_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_pf_o2_cat)
test <- roc.test(roc_sf_pf_o2_cat, roc_sf_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "SF_PF_O2_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_pf_o2_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_pf_o2_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_pf_o2_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_pf_o2_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_pf_o2_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_pf_o2_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_pf_o2_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_pf_o2_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF_PF vs SF: O2 Cat",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_sf_pf_o2_cat)

#BOth SF and PF Measured Contemporaneously
#SF O2 Cat
dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat,
         analysis=='sf_pf') 
dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_pf_glm_cat_contemp, newdata = dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat)

roc_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$label, 
                                predictor = roc_df_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$score)
auc_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- auc(roc_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat)
ci_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat)
test <- roc.test(roc_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat, roc_sf_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "SF_PF_Contemp_O2_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF_PF Contemporaneously Measured vs SF: O2 Cat",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat)

#BOth SF and PF Available 
#SOFA
dat_sf_pf_sofa <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% sf_pf_sofa,
         analysis=='sf_pf') 
dat_sf_pf_sofa <- dat_sf_pf_sofa |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_pf_glm_sofa, newdata = dat_sf_pf_sofa, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_pf_sofa <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_pf_sofa)

roc_sf_pf_sofa <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_pf_sofa$label, 
                      predictor = roc_df_sf_pf_sofa$score)
auc_sf_pf_sofa <- auc(roc_sf_pf_sofa)
ci_sf_pf_sofa <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_pf_sofa, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_pf_sofa <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_pf_sofa, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_pf_sofa)
test <- roc.test(roc_sf_pf_sofa, roc_sf_sofa_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "SF_PF_SOFA",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_pf_sofa$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_pf_sofa$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_pf_sofa, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_pf_sofa[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_pf_sofa[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_pf_sofa$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_pf_sofa$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_pf_sofa$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF_PF vs SF: SOFA Cat",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_sf_pf_sofa)

#SF and PF COntemporaneously Measured
#SOFA
dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- aggregate_mortality_hospital %>%
  filter(strata %in% sf_pf_sofa_contemp,
         analysis=='sf_pf') 
dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_pf_glm_sofa_contemp, newdata = dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp)

roc_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$label, 
                              predictor = roc_df_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$score)
auc_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- auc(roc_sf_pf_sofa_contemp)
ci_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf_pf_sofa_contemp, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_pf_sofa_contemp <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_pf_sofa_contemp)
test <- roc.test(roc_sf_pf_sofa_contemp, roc_sf_pf_sofa, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "SF_PF_Contemp_SOFA",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = dat_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_sf_pf_sofa_contemp, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_pf_sofa_contemp[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_pf_sofa_contemp[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_pf_sofa_contemp$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF_PF Contemp Meausure vs SF: SOFA Cat",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
```

```{r Assess Combined Categorical Models with Both SF and PF Included}
set.seed(3982)
combined_model_df <- aggregate_mortality_hospital |>
  mutate(
    new_strata=fcase(
      grepl('undefined', strata, ignore.case=T), 'undefined',
      grepl('not', strata, ignore.case=T), 'not_hypoxemic',
      grepl('mild', strata, ignore.case=T), 'mild_hypoxemia',
      grepl('moderate', strata, ignore.case=T), 'moderate_hypoxemia',
      grepl('severe', strata, ignore.case=T), 'severe_hypoxemia',
      grepl('0', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa0',
      grepl('1', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa1', 
      grepl('2', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa2',
      grepl('3', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa3',
      grepl('4', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa4',
      grepl('5', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa5'
    ),
    measure_type=fcase(
      grepl('pf-', strata, ignore.case=T), 'pf',
      grepl('sf-', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sf',
      grepl('sf_pf', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sf'
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(new_strata),
         !is.na(measure_type)) 
new_strata_sofa <- c(
  'sofa0',
  'sofa1',
  'sofa2',
  'sofa3',
  'sofa4',
  'sofa5'
)
new_strata_o2 <- c(
  'not_hypoxemic',
  'mild_hypoxemia',
  'moderate_hypoxemia',
  'severe_hypoxemia'
)

#Model with Both SF and PF Defined O2 Cat
both_o2cat_glm <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    new_strata + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(combined_model_df,
                      analysis=='overall',
                      strata_type=='o2_strata') |>
         mutate(new_strata=factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_o2, ordered=F)),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_o2_cat' <- tidy_make(both_o2cat_glm, 'Both_O2Cat')

both_o2_cat <- combined_model_df %>%
 filter(analysis=='overall',
        strata_type=='o2_strata') |>
  distinct()
both_o2_cat <- both_o2_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(both_o2cat_glm, newdata = both_o2_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0) 

roc_both_df_o2_cat <- expand_to_patients(both_o2_cat) |>
  left_join(both_o2_cat %>% select(strata, new_strata, measure_type) %>% distinct(), by='strata') |>
  select(-strata) |>
  rename(strata=measure_type)

roc_both_o2_cat <- roc(response = roc_both_df_o2_cat$label, 
                       predictor = roc_both_df_o2_cat$score)
auc_both_cat <- auc(roc_both_o2_cat)
ci_both_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_both_o2_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_both_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(both_o2_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
#For Now Compare to the Best Performing Individual Categorical Model
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_both_df_o2_cat)
test <- roc.test(roc_sf_o2_cat, roc_both_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_O2_Cat_Includes SF and PF",
  model_n_patients = both_o2_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = both_o2_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_both_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_both_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_both_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_both_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_both_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_both_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF and PF O2 Cat vs SF O2 Cat",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_both_df_o2_cat)

#Now Model with BOth SF and PF Cat PLUS indicator of whether an SF or PF
#Model with Both SF and PF Defined O2 Cat
both_o2cat_type_glm <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    new_strata + measure_type + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(combined_model_df,
                      analysis=='overall',
                      strata_type=='o2_strata') |>
    mutate(new_strata=factor(new_strata, levels=new_strata_o2, ordered=F)),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_o2_cat_type' <- tidy_make(both_o2cat_type_glm, 'Both_O2Cat_MeasureType')

both_o2_cat <- combined_model_df %>%
 filter(analysis=='overall',
        strata_type=='o2_strata') |>
  distinct()
both_o2_cat <- both_o2_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(both_o2cat_type_glm, newdata = both_o2_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(site))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0) 

roc_both_df_o2_cat <- expand_to_patients(both_o2_cat) |>
  left_join(both_o2_cat %>% select(strata, new_strata, measure_type) %>% distinct(), by='strata') |>
  select(-strata) |>
  rename(strata=measure_type)

roc_both_o2_cat_type <- roc(response = roc_both_df_o2_cat$label, 
                       predictor = roc_both_df_o2_cat$score)
auc_both_cat <- auc(roc_both_o2_cat_type)
ci_both_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_both_o2_cat_type, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_both_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(both_o2_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_both_df_o2_cat)
#For Now Compare to the Best Performing Individual Categorical Model
test <- roc.test(roc_both_o2_cat_type, roc_both_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_O2_Cat_Includes SF and PF_AND_MeasureType",
  model_n_patients = both_o2_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = both_o2_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_both_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_both_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_both_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_both_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_both_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_both_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF and PF O2 Cat vs Adding Measure Type",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_both_df_o2_cat)

#######################
### Now Repeat for SOFA
#######################
both_sofa_glm <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    new_strata + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(combined_model_df,
                      analysis=='overall',
                      strata_type=='sofa_strata') |>
    mutate(new_strata=factor(new_strata, levels=new_strata_sofa, ordered=F)),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_sofa_cat' <- tidy_make(both_sofa_glm, 'Both_SOFACat')

both_sofa_cat <- combined_model_df %>%
 filter(analysis=='overall',
        strata_type=='sofa_strata') |>
  distinct()
both_sofa_cat <- both_sofa_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(both_sofa_glm, newdata = both_sofa_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(site))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0) 

roc_both_df_sofa_cat <- expand_to_patients(both_sofa_cat) |>
  left_join(both_sofa_cat %>% select(strata, new_strata, measure_type) %>% distinct(), by='strata') |>
  select(-strata) |>
  rename(strata=measure_type)

roc_both_sofa_cat <- roc(response = roc_both_df_sofa_cat$label, 
                       predictor = roc_both_df_sofa_cat$score)
auc_both_cat <- auc(roc_both_sofa_cat)
ci_both_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_both_sofa_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_both_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(both_sofa_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_both_df_sofa_cat)
#For Now Compare to the Best Performing Individual Categorical Model
test <- roc.test(roc_sf_sofa_cat, roc_both_sofa_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SOFA_Cat_Includes SF and PF",
  model_n_patients = both_sofa_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = both_sofa_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_both_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_both_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_both_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_both_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_both_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_both_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF and PF SOFA vs SF SOFA",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_both_df_sofa_cat)

#Now Model with BOth SF and PF Cat PLUS indicator of whether an SF or PF
#Model with Both SF and PF Defined O2 Cat
both_sofa_type_glm <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    new_strata + measure_type + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(combined_model_df,
                      analysis=='overall',
                      strata_type %in% c('sofa_strata')) |>
      mutate(new_strata=factor(new_strata, level=new_strata_sofa, ordered=F)),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_sofa_type' <- tidy_make(both_sofa_type_glm, 'Both_SOFA_MeasureType')

both_sofa_cat <- combined_model_df %>%
 filter(analysis=='overall',
        strata_type=='sofa_strata') |>
  distinct()
both_sofa_cat <- both_sofa_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(both_sofa_type_glm, newdata = both_sofa_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(hospital_id))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0) 

roc_both_df_sofa_cat_type <- expand_to_patients(both_sofa_cat) |>
  left_join(both_sofa_cat %>% select(strata, new_strata, measure_type) %>% distinct(), by='strata') |>
  select(-strata) |>
  rename(strata=measure_type)

roc_both_sofa_cat_type <- roc(response = roc_both_df_sofa_cat_type$label, 
                       predictor = roc_both_df_sofa_cat_type$score)
auc_both_cat <- auc(roc_both_sofa_cat_type)
ci_both_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_both_sofa_cat_type, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
```
