```{r Assess Combined Categorical Models with Both SF and PF Included}
brier_both_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(both_sofa_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_both_df_sofa_cat_type)
#For Now Compare to the Best Performing Individual Categorical Model
test <- roc.test(roc_both_sofa_cat_type, roc_both_sofa_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SOFA_Includes SF and PF_AND_MeasureType",
  model_n_patients = both_sofa_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = both_sofa_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_both_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_both_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_both_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_both_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_both_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_both_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF and PF O2 Cat vs Adding Measure Type",
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_both_df_sofa_cat_type)
```


```{r Repeat Catgorical ROC With Race}
set.seed(32284)
aggregate_categories_race <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_race.csv') |>
  filter(!is.na(new_race_cat),
         level==1,
         variable=='death_hospice28') |> #only need One Row per Outcome) 
  mutate(
    black=fifelse(new_race_cat=='black', 'black', 'not_black')
  ) |>
 group_by(site, black, strata_type, strata, analysis) |>
 summarise(
   n_in_group=sum(n, na.rm=T), 
   n_deathhosp28=sum(freq, na.rm=T)
 ) |>
  filter(!(strata_type=='o2_strata' & analysis=='sf_pf'),
         !(strata_type=='sofa_strata' & analysis=='sf_pf')) |>
  ungroup()

race_strata  <- c("black", "not_black")
names <- c('pf_o2_cat', 'pf_sofa', 'sf_o2_cat', 'sf_sofa', 
                'sf_pf_o2_cat', 'sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat')
metrics <- list(pf_o2_cat, pf_sofa, sf_o2_cat, sf_sofa, 
                sf_pf_o2_cat, sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat)
metrics <- setNames(metrics, names)
glm_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(names)), names)

#First Do for Just 'Overall'
for (m in names) {
glm_models[[m]] <- setNames(vector("list", length(race_strata)), race_strata)  
strata_levels <- metrics[[m]] 
for (z in race_strata) {
    dat <- aggregate_categories_race |>
      #mutate(drop=fifelse(m=='pf_o2_cat' & analysis=='sf_pf', 1L, 0L)) |>
      filter(strata %in% metrics[[m]], 
             black == z,
             n_in_group>0) |>
      mutate(strata=factor(strata, levels = strata_levels, ordered=F))

    if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No rows for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    fit <- glmmTMB(
      cbind(n_deathhosp28,  n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ strata + (1 | site),
      data   = dat,
      family = binomial()
    )

    glm_models[[m]][[z]] <- fit
  }
}

#Put into Tidy Tables
for (m in names(glm_models)) {
  for (z in names(glm_models[[m]])) {
      fit <- glm_models[[m]][[z]]
        if (is.null(fit)) next
          lbl <- paste(m, z, sep = "_") 
out <- tryCatch({
tidy_make(fit, lbl)
}, error = function(e) {
warning(sprintf("tidy_make failed for %s / %s: %s", m, z, e$message))
return(NULL)
})
if (!is.null(out)) {
# if tidy_make returns a data.frame, add identifying columns
if (is.data.frame(out)) {
out$metric <- m
out$race   <- z
tidy_models_list[[lbl]] <- out
} else {
# if tidy_make returns something else, store it named
all_tidy[[lbl]] <- out
}
}
}
}

#Repeat Looping for ROC Analysis
set.seed(3982)
roc_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(names)), names)
for (m in names(glm_models)) {
  strata_levels <- metrics[[m]] 
  for (z in race_strata) {
      fit <- glm_models[[m]][[z]]
  if (is.null(fit)) {
      warning(sprintf("No fitted model for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

   lbl <- paste(m, z, sep = "_") 
   # Use the same data that was used to fit
    df <- aggregate_categories_race %>%
      filter(strata %in% c(strata_levels), 
             black == z,
             n_in_group>0) |>
      mutate(
        deaths = n_deathhosp28,
        survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
        model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
      )
    df$pred <-  predict(fit, newdata=df, type='response', re.form = NA)

    # Drop rows with missing predictions or zero total counts
    df <- df %>% filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

    # Expand aggregated counts: one row per individual
    deaths_df <- df |>
      filter(deaths>0) |>
      mutate(
        n=deaths,
        label=1L) |>
      uncount(n) 
    
    survivors_df <- df |>
      filter(survivors>0) |>
      mutate(
        n=survivors,
        label=0L
      ) |>
      uncount(n)
    
    roc_df <- rowbind(deaths_df, survivors_df) |>
      mutate(score=pred)

if (nrow(roc_df) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No data to compute ROC for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = roc_df$label, predictor = roc_df$score, quiet = TRUE)
    auc_val <- pROC::auc(roc_obj)
    ci_val  <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
    brier <- compute_weighted_brier(roc_df, cluster_col='site',
                                    boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
    vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df)
    # Store both the ROC object and a small summary
    roc_models[[m]][[z]] <- list(
      roc = roc_obj,
      auc = as.numeric(auc_val),
      ci  = ci_val)
    
    roc_table <- roc_table |>
      rowbind(data.frame(
        model = paste0(m, "_", z, "_subgroup"),
        model_n_patients = df$model_n[1],
        model_n_hospitals = NA_real_,
        auc   = round(as.numeric(auc_val), 3),
        ci_low = round(ci_val[1], 3),
        ci_hi  = round(ci_val[3], 3),
        brier       = round(brier$value, 2),
        brier_low   = round(brier$ci[1], 2),
        brier_hi    = round(brier$ci[2], 2),
        ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
        ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
        ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
        comparison = NA_character_,
        p.value    = NA_real_
      ), fill=T
    )
  }
}
rm(roc_df)

#Test and Then Add Comparisons to Table
get_roc_obj <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(NULL)
  if (inherits(x, "roc")) return(x)
  if (is.list(x) && inherits(x$roc, "roc")) return(x$roc)
  return(NULL)
}
test_table <- setNames(vector("list", length(names)), names)
for (m in names) {
  roc_black <- get_roc_obj(roc_models[[m]][['black']])
  roc_not_black <- get_roc_obj(roc_models[[m]][['not_black']])
  if (is.null(roc_black) || is.null(roc_not_black)) {
    warning(sprintf("Skipping %s: missing or invalid ROC object for black or not_black", m))
    test_table[[m]] <- NULL
    next
  }
  test_table[[m]] <- tryCatch({
    # set a seed here if you want reproducible bootstrap tests
    # set.seed(3982)
    pROC::roc.test(roc_black, roc_not_black, method = 'bootstrap', boot.n = BOOT_NUM)
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(sprintf("roc.test failed for %s: %s", m, e$message))
    list(error = e$message)
  })
}

summary_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names, function(m) {
  t <- test_table[[m]]
  if (is.null(t) || is.list(t) && !inherits(t, "htest")) {
    return(data.frame(metric = m, p.value = NA_real_))
  }
  data.frame(metric = m, p.value = as.numeric(t$p.value))
}))
summary_df <- summary_df |>
  mutate(
    model=paste0(metric,'_black_subgroup')) |>
  select(-metric)
rm(test_table)

#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  left_join(summary_df %>% select(model, new_p=p.value), by='model') |>
  mutate(p.value=ifelse(is.na(p.value), new_p, p.value)) |>
  select(-new_p)

#Save ROC Models by Race
roc_models_by_race <- roc_models
```


```{r ROC Analysis Stratified by Respiratory Support}
set.seed(32284)
aggregate_categories_resp <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_resp_support.csv') |>
  filter(!is.na(resp_support_category),
         level==1,
         variable=='death_hospice28') |> #only need One Row per Outcome) 
 group_by(site, resp_support_category, strata_type, strata, analysis) |>
 summarise(
   n_in_group=sum(n, na.rm=T), 
   n_deathhosp28=sum(freq, na.rm=T)
 ) |>
  filter(!(strata_type=='o2_strata' & analysis=='sf_pf'),
         !(strata_type=='sofa_strata' & analysis=='sf_pf')) |>
  ungroup()

resp_strata  <- c("imv", "high_flow_nc", "nippv")
names <- c('pf_o2_cat', 'pf_sofa', 'sf_o2_cat', 'sf_sofa', 
                'sf_pf_o2_cat', 'sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat')
metrics <- list(pf_o2_cat, pf_sofa, sf_o2_cat, sf_sofa, 
                sf_pf_o2_cat, sf_pf_o2_contemp_cat)
metrics <- setNames(metrics, names)
glm_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(names)), names)

#First Do for Just 'Overall'
for (m in names) {
glm_models[[m]] <- setNames(vector("list", length(resp_strata)), resp_strata)  
strata_levels <- metrics[[m]] 
for (z in resp_strata) {
    dat <- aggregate_categories_resp |>
      filter(strata %in% metrics[[m]], 
             resp_support_category == z,
             n_in_group>0) |>
      mutate(strata=factor(strata, levels = strata_levels, ordered=F))

    if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No rows for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    fit <- glmmTMB(
      cbind(n_deathhosp28,  n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ strata + (1 | site),
      data   = dat,
      family = binomial()
    )

    glm_models[[m]][[z]] <- fit
  }
}

#Put into Tidy Tables
for (m in names(glm_models)) {
  for (z in names(glm_models[[m]])) {
      fit <- glm_models[[m]][[z]]
        if (is.null(fit)) next
          lbl <- paste(m, z, sep = "_") 
out <- tryCatch({
tidy_make(fit, lbl)
}, error = function(e) {
warning(sprintf("tidy_make failed for %s / %s: %s", m, z, e$message))
return(NULL)
})
if (!is.null(out)) {
# if tidy_make returns a data.frame, add identifying columns
if (is.data.frame(out)) {
out$metric <- m
out$resp   <- z
tidy_models_list[[lbl]] <- out
} else {
# if tidy_make returns something else, store it named
all_tidy[[lbl]] <- out
}
}
}
}

#Repeat Looping for ROC Analysis
set.seed(3982)
roc_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(names)), names)
for (m in names(glm_models)) {
  strata_levels <- metrics[[m]] 
  for (z in resp_strata) {
      fit <- glm_models[[m]][[z]]
  if (is.null(fit)) {
      warning(sprintf("No fitted model for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

   lbl <- paste(m, z, sep = "_") 
   # Use the same data that was used to fit
    df <- aggregate_categories_resp %>%
      filter(strata %in% c(strata_levels), 
             resp_support_category == z,
             n_in_group>0) |>
      mutate(
        deaths = n_deathhosp28,
        survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
        model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
      )
    df$pred <-  predict(fit, newdata=df, type='response', re.form = NA)

    # Drop rows with missing predictions or zero total counts
    df <- df %>% filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

    # Expand aggregated counts: one row per individual
    deaths_df <- df |>
      filter(deaths>0) |>
      mutate(
        n=deaths,
        label=1L) |>
      uncount(n) 
    
    survivors_df <- df |>
      filter(survivors>0) |>
      mutate(
        n=survivors,
        label=0L
      ) |>
      uncount(n)
    
    roc_df <- rowbind(deaths_df, survivors_df) |>
      mutate(score=pred)

if (nrow(roc_df) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No data to compute ROC for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = roc_df$label, predictor = roc_df$score, quiet = TRUE)
    auc_val <- pROC::auc(roc_obj)
    ci_val  <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
    brier <- compute_weighted_brier(roc_df, cluster_col='site',
                                    boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
    vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df)
    # Store both the ROC object and a small summary
    roc_models[[m]][[z]] <- list(
      roc = roc_obj,
      auc = as.numeric(auc_val),
      ci  = ci_val)
    
    roc_table <- roc_table |>
      rowbind(data.frame(
        model = paste0(m, "_", z, "_subgroup"),
        model_n_patients = df$model_n[1],
        model_n_hospitals = NA_real_,
        auc   = round(as.numeric(auc_val), 3),
        ci_low = round(ci_val[1], 3),
        ci_hi  = round(ci_val[3], 3),
        brier       = round(brier$value, 2),
        brier_low   = round(brier$ci[1], 2),
        brier_hi    = round(brier$ci[2], 2),
        ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
        ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
        ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
        comparison = NA_character_,
        p.value    = NA_real_
      ), fill=T
    )
  }
}
rm(roc_df)

#Test and Then Add Comparisons to Table
get_roc_obj <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(NULL)
  if (inherits(x, "roc")) return(x)
  if (is.list(x) && inherits(x$roc, "roc")) return(x$roc)
  return(NULL)
}

#Comparisons for Resp Support ROC Objects
comparisons <- list(
imv_vs_nippv = c("imv", "nippv"),
imv_vs_hfnc  = c("imv", "high_flow_nc")
)

test_table <- setNames(vector("list", length(names)), names)
for (m in names) {
roc_entries <- roc_models[[m]]
if (is.null(roc_entries) || !is.list(roc_entries)) {
warning("Missing or invalid roc_models entry for metric: ", m)
next
}
tests_for_metric <- list()
for (cmp_name in names(comparisons)) {
pair <- comparisons[[cmp_name]]
roc_ref  <- get_roc_obj(roc_entries[[ pair[1] ]])  # "imv"
roc_comp <- get_roc_obj(roc_entries[[ pair[2] ]])  # comparator

if (is.null(roc_ref) || is.null(roc_comp)) {
  warning(sprintf("Skipping %s %s: missing roc for %s or %s", m, cmp_name, pair[1], pair[2]))
  tests_for_metric[[cmp_name]] <- NULL
  next
}

tests_for_metric[[cmp_name]] <- tryCatch({
  pROC::roc.test(roc_ref, roc_comp, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM)
}, error = function(e) {
  warning(sprintf("roc.test failed for %s %s: %s", m, cmp_name, e$message))
  list(error = e$message)
})
}
test_table[[m]] <- tests_for_metric
}
summary_rows <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(test_table), function(m) {
tests <- test_table[[m]]
if (is.null(tests)) return(NULL)
do.call(rbind, lapply(names(tests), function(cmp_name) {
t <- tests[[cmp_name]]
pval <- NA_real_
if (!is.null(t) && inherits(t, "htest") && !is.null(t$p.value)) pval <- as.numeric(t$p.value)
data.frame(metric = m, comparison = cmp_name, p.value = pval, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
}))
rownames(summary_rows) <- NULL

#Prepare for Merging
summary_rows <- summary_rows |>
  mutate(
    model=fcase(
      grepl('hfnc', comparison), paste0(metric, "_high_flow_nc_subgroup"),
      grepl('imv', comparison), paste0(metric, "_nippv_subgroup")
    )) |>
  select(-metric)
rm(test_table)

#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  left_join(summary_rows %>% select(model, new_p=p.value), by='model') |>
  mutate(p.value=ifelse(is.na(p.value), new_p, p.value)) |>
  select(-new_p)

#Save Roc Models by Resp
roc_models_by_resp <- roc_models
rm(roc_models)
```


```{r Modesls with SF and PF Categories AND Measure Type And Support}
set.seed(3982)
combined_model_df <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_resp_support.csv') |>
  mutate(
    new_strata=fcase(
      grepl('undefined', strata, ignore.case=T), 'undefined',
      grepl('not', strata, ignore.case=T), 'not_hypoxemic',
      grepl('mild', strata, ignore.case=T), 'mild_hypoxemia',
      grepl('moderate', strata, ignore.case=T), 'moderate_hypoxemia',
      grepl('severe', strata, ignore.case=T), 'severe_hypoxemia',
      grepl('0', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa0',
      grepl('1', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa1', 
      grepl('2', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa2',
      grepl('3', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa3',
      grepl('4', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa4',
      grepl('5', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa5'
    ),
    measure_type=fcase(
      grepl('pf-', strata, ignore.case=T), 'pf',
      grepl('sf-', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sf',
      grepl('sf_pf', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sf'
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(new_strata),
         !is.na(measure_type),
         variable=='death_hospice28',
         level==1) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=n,
    n_deathhosp28=freq
  )
new_strata_sofa <- c(
  'sofa0',
  'sofa1',
  'sofa2',
  'sofa3',
  'sofa4',
  'sofa5'
)
new_strata_o2 <- c(
  'not_hypoxemic',
  'mild_hypoxemia',
  'moderate_hypoxemia',
  'severe_hypoxemia'
)

#Model with Both SF and PF Defined O2 Cat AND Measure Type AND Resp Support Type
both_o2cat_resp <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    new_strata + factor(measure_type) + 
    factor(resp_support_category) + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(combined_model_df,
                     strata %in% c(pf_o2_cat, sf_o2_cat),
                     analysis=='overall') |>
         mutate(new_strata=factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_o2, ordered=F)),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_o2_cat_resp' <- tidy_make(both_o2cat_resp, 'Both_O2Cat_Resp_SF_PF')

both_o2_cat <- combined_model_df %>%
 filter(strata %in% c(pf_o2_cat, sf_o2_cat),
        analysis=='overall') |>
  distinct()
both_o2_cat <- both_o2_cat |>
  mutate(pred = predict(both_o2cat_resp, newdata = both_o2_cat, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(site))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0) 

roc_both_df_o2_cat <- both_o2_cat |>
  mutate(
    died=1
  ) |>
  uncount(weights=n_deathhosp28)
alive <- both_o2_cat |>
  mutate(
    died=0) |>
  uncount(weights=survivors) 
roc_both_df_o2_cat <- roc_both_df_o2_cat |>
  rowbind(alive, fill=T) |>
  mutate(score=pred, label=died)
rm(alive)

roc_both_o2_cat <- roc(response = roc_both_df_o2_cat$died, 
                       predictor = roc_both_df_o2_cat$pred)

auc_both_cat <- auc(roc_both_o2_cat)
ci_both_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_both_o2_cat, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_both_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(both_o2_cat, boot_n = BOOT_NUM, cluster_col = 'site')
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_both_df_o2_cat)
rm(roc_both_df_o2_cat)
#For Now Compare to the Best Performing Individual Categorical Model
#test <- roc.test(roc_sf_o2_cat, roc_both_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "SF and PF AND Resp Support and Type_O2 Cat",
  model_n_patients = both_o2_cat$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = both_o2_cat$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_both_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_both_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_both_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_both_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_both_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_both_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = NA_character_,
  p.value = NA_real_
))


#######################
### Now Repeat for SOFA
#######################
both_sofa_glm <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~ 
    new_strata + factor(measure_type) + 
    factor(resp_support_category) + (1 | site),
  data = dplyr::filter(combined_model_df,
                     strata %in% c(pf_sofa, sf_sofa),
                     analysis=='overall') |>
         mutate(new_strata=factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_sofa, ordered=F)),
  family = binomial(link="logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_sofa_resp' <- tidy_make(both_o2cat_resp, 'Both_SOFA_Resp_SF_PF')

both_sofa <- combined_model_df %>%
 filter(strata %in% c(pf_sofa, sf_sofa),
        analysis=='overall') |>
  distinct()
both_sofa <- both_sofa |>
  mutate(pred = predict(both_sofa_glm, newdata = both_sofa, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=length(unique(site))) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0) 

roc_both_df_sofa <- both_sofa |>
  mutate(
    died=1
  ) |>
  uncount(weights=n_deathhosp28)
alive <- both_sofa |>
  mutate(
    died=0) |>
  uncount(weights=survivors) 
roc_both_df_sofa <- roc_both_df_sofa |>
  rowbind(alive, fill=T) |>
  mutate(score=pred, label=died)
rm(alive)

roc_both_sofa <- roc(response = roc_both_df_sofa$died, 
                       predictor = roc_both_df_sofa$pred)

auc_both_cat <- auc(roc_both_sofa)
ci_both_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_both_sofa, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_both_cat <- compute_weighted_brier(both_sofa, boot_n = BOOT_NUM, cluster_col = 'site')
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_both_df_sofa)
rm(roc_both_df_sofa)
#For Now Compare to the Best Performing Individual Categorical Model
test <- roc.test(roc_both_sofa, roc_both_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "SF and PF AND Resp Support and Type_SOFA",
  model_n_patients = both_sofa$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = both_sofa$model_hospitals[1],
  auc = round(auc_both_cat, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_both_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_both_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_both_cat$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_both_cat$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_both_cat$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = "SF Compared to PF SOFA vs O2 Cat",
  p.value = as.numeric(test$p.value)
))

#Add Additional P-Values- Compare Models that INclude both SF and PF with Measure Type With and Without Respiratory Support
#Add Additional P-valuees to ROC Table
test1 <- roc.test(roc_both_o2_cat_type, roc_both_o2_cat, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
test2 <- roc.test(roc_both_sofa_cat_type, roc_both_sofa, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)


roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    p.value=fcase(
    model=='SF and PF AND Resp Support and Type_O2 Cat', as.numeric(test1$p.value),
    model=='SF and PF AND Resp Support and Type_SOFA', as.numeric(test2$p.value),
    default = p.value),
    comparison=fcase(
      model=='SF and PF AND Resp Support and Type_O2 Cat', 'Without Respiratory Support',
      model=='SF and PF AND Resp Support and Type_SOFA', 'Without Respiratory Support', 
      default=comparison
    )
    )
```

```{r Sensitivity Analysis - Add ABG Propensity by Hospital}
set.seed(3982)
mortality_with_abg <- aggregate_mortality_hospital |>
  mutate(
    new_strata=fcase(
      grepl('undefined', strata, ignore.case=T), 'undefined',
      grepl('not', strata, ignore.case=T), 'not_hypoxemic',
      grepl('mild', strata, ignore.case=T), 'mild_hypoxemia',
      grepl('moderate', strata, ignore.case=T), 'moderate_hypoxemia',
      grepl('severe', strata, ignore.case=T), 'severe_hypoxemia',
      grepl('0', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa0',
      grepl('1', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa1', 
      grepl('2', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa2',
      grepl('3', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa3',
      grepl('4', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa4',
      grepl('5', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sofa5'
    ),
    measure_type=fcase(
      grepl('sf-', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sf',
      grepl('pf-', strata, ignore.case=T), 'pf',
      grepl('sf_pf', strata, ignore.case=T), 'sf_pf'
    ),
    measure_type=factor(measure_type, levels=c('sf', 'pf', 'sf_pf'))
  ) |>
  mutate(measure_type=factor(measure_type)) |>
  filter(!is.na(new_strata),
         !is.na(measure_type)) |>
  mutate(log_odds_abg=qlogis(percent_with_abg))

new_strata_sofa <- c(
  'sofa0',
  'sofa1',
  'sofa2',
  'sofa3',
  'sofa4',
  'sofa5'
)
new_strata_o2 <- c(
  'not_hypoxemic',
  'mild_hypoxemia',
  'moderate_hypoxemia',
  'severe_hypoxemia'
) 

###############################
#ARDS Criteria
###############################

both_glm_o2_cat_abg <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    new_strata + measure_type*log_odds_abg + (1 | site),
data   = mortality_with_abg |> 
  dplyr::filter(new_strata %in%  new_strata_o2, 
                measure_type!='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(new_strata = factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_o2, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
#tidy_models_list[['pf_o2_cat_abg_propensity']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_o2_cat, "PF - O2Cat_ABG")
tidy_models_list$'both_o2_cat_w_abg' <- tidy_make(both_glm_o2_cat_abg, "Both_O2Cat_ABG")

#Now Interaction of Measure Type and Hypoxemia Category
both_glm_o2_cat_type_interaction <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    new_strata*measure_type + (1 | site),
data   = mortality_with_abg |> 
  dplyr::filter(new_strata %in%  new_strata_o2, 
                measure_type!='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(new_strata = factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_o2, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_o2_cat_w_type_interaction' <- tidy_make(both_glm_o2_cat_type_interaction, "Both_O2-Type_Interaction")

###############################
#SOFA Criteria
###############################
both_glm_sofa_abg <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    new_strata + measure_type*log_odds_abg + (1 | site),
data   = mortality_with_abg |> 
  dplyr::filter(new_strata %in%  new_strata_sofa, 
                measure_type!='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(new_strata = factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_sofa, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
#tidy_models_list[['pf_o2_cat_abg_propensity']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_o2_cat, "PF - O2Cat_ABG")
tidy_models_list$'both_sofa_abg' <- tidy_make(both_glm_sofa_abg, "Both_SOFA_ABG")

#Now Interaction of Measure Type and Hypoxemia Category
both_glm_sofa_type_interaction <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    new_strata*measure_type + (1 | site),
data   = mortality_with_abg |> 
  dplyr::filter(new_strata %in%  new_strata_sofa, 
                measure_type!='sf_pf') |>
  mutate(new_strata = factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_sofa, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
tidy_models_list$'both_sofa_type_interaction' <- tidy_make(both_glm_sofa_type_interaction, "Both_SOFA-Type_Interaction")
```


```{r Plot ABG Interaction}
##O2 Cat
pred_data <- expand.grid(
  log_odds_abg = seq(qlogis(0.1), qlogis(0.8), by = 0.1),  # 10% to 80% ABG
  new_strata = new_strata_o2,
  site = 'hopkins',
  measure_type = c("pf", "sf")  # assuming these are your measure types
)

preds <- predictions(both_glm_o2_cat_abg, newdata=pred_data, re.form=NA) |>
  mutate(
    probability_abg=plogis(log_odds_abg)
  )
preds <- as.data.frame(preds)

df <- preds |> filter(new_strata=='severe_hypoxemia')

severe <- ggplot(df, aes(x = probability_abg*100, y = estimate, 
                            color = measure_type, fill = measure_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2) +
  #facet_wrap(~ new_strata, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits=c(0,1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted 28-day Hospital Mortality by Hospital Use of ABGs",
    subtitle = "Severe Hypoxemia",
    x = "Percentage of ABG measurements (%)",
    y = "Predicted Mortality (%)",
    color = "Measure Type",
    fill = "Measure Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

df <- preds |> filter(new_strata=='moderate_hypoxemia')

moderate <- ggplot(df, aes(x = probability_abg*100, y = estimate, 
                            color = measure_type, fill = measure_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2) +
  #facet_wrap(~ new_strata, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits=c(0,1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted 28-day Hospital Mortality by Hospital Use of ABGs",
    subtitle = "Moderate Hypoxemia",
    x = "Percentage of ABG measurements (%)",
    y = "Predicted Mortality (%)",
    color = "Measure Type",
    fill = "Measure Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

df <- preds |> filter(new_strata=='mild_hypoxemia')

mild <- ggplot(df, aes(x = probability_abg*100, y = estimate, 
                            color = measure_type, fill = measure_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.2) +
  #facet_wrap(~ new_strata, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits=c(0,1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted 28-day Hospital Mortality by Hospital Use of ABGs",
    subtitle = "Mild Hypoxemia",
    x = "Percentage of ABG measurements (%)",
    y = "Predicted Mortality (%)",
    color = "Measure Type",
    fill = "Measure Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

graph <- (mild/moderate/severe)

ggsave(
  filename='interaction_w_abg_o2cat.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  height=12,
  width=8,
  units='in')
```


```{r Models That Uses All SF Measures}
all_sf_model <- combined_model_df |>
  filter(grepl('sf', strata)==T,
         !grepl('contemp', strata)==T)

###########################
####O2 Cat
###########################
all_sf_glm_o2_cat <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    new_strata + (1 | site),
  data   = all_sf_model |> 
  dplyr::filter(new_strata %in%  new_strata_o2) |>
  mutate(new_strata = factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_o2, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
#tidy_models_list[['pf_o2_cat_abg_propensity']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_o2_cat, "PF - O2Cat_ABG")
tidy_models_list$'all_sf_o2_cat' <- tidy_make(all_sf_glm_o2_cat, "All_SF_O2Cat")

###########################
#### SOFA
###########################
all_sf_glm_sofa <- glmmTMB(
  cbind(n_deathhosp28, n_in_group - n_deathhosp28) ~
    new_strata + (1 | site),
  data   = all_sf_model |> 
  dplyr::filter(new_strata %in%  new_strata_sofa) |>
  mutate(new_strata = factor(new_strata, levels = new_strata_sofa, ordered = F)),
family = binomial(link = "logit")
)
#tidy_models_list[['pf_o2_cat_abg_propensity']] <- tidy_make(pf_glm_o2_cat, "PF - O2Cat_ABG")
tidy_models_list$'all_sf_sofa' <- tidy_make(all_sf_glm_sofa, "All_SF_SOFA")

#ROC Models
###O2 Cat
set.seed(3982)
dat_sf_all_o2 <- all_sf_model %>%
  filter(new_strata %in% new_strata_o2) |>
  distinct()
dat_sf_all_o2 <- dat_sf_all_o2 |>
  mutate(pred = predict(all_sf_glm_o2_cat, 
                        newdata = dat_sf_all_o2, 
                        type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=NA_real_) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_all_o2 <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_all_o2)

roc_all_sf_o2 <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_all_o2$label, predictor = roc_df_sf_all_o2$score)
auc_sf_all_o2 <- auc(roc_all_sf_o2)
ci_sf_all_o2_cat <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_all_sf_o2, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_all_o2 <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_all_o2, boot_n = BOOT_NUM, cluster_col='site')
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_all_o2)
#test <- roc.test(roc_sf, roc_sf_median, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "ALL_SF_O2_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_all_o2$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = NA_real_,
  auc = round(auc_sf_all_o2 , digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_all_o2_cat[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_all_o2_cat[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_all_o2$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_all_o2$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_all_o2$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = NA_character_,
  p.value = NA_real_
))
rm(roc_df_sf_all_o2)

#ROC Models
###SOFA
dat_sf_all_sofa <- all_sf_model %>%
  filter(new_strata %in% new_strata_sofa) |>
  distinct()
dat_sf_all_sofa <- dat_sf_all_sofa |>
  mutate(pred = predict(all_sf_glm_sofa, 
                        newdata = dat_sf_all_sofa, 
                        type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths,
         model_n=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
         model_hospitals=NA_real_) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf_all_sofa <- expand_to_patients(dat_sf_all_sofa)

roc_all_sf_sofa <- roc(response = roc_df_sf_all_sofa$label, predictor = roc_df_sf_all_sofa$score)
auc_sf_all_sofa <- auc(roc_all_sf_sofa)
ci_sf_all_sofa <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_all_sf_sofa, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, boot.stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf_all_sofa <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf_all_sofa, boot_n = BOOT_NUM, cluster_col='site')
vals <- bootstrap_val_prob_clustered(roc_df_sf_all_sofa)
test <- roc.test(roc_all_sf_sofa, roc_all_sf_o2, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
  model = "ALL_SF_O2_Cat",
  model_n_patients = dat_sf_all_sofa$model_n[1],
  model_n_hospitals = NA_real_,
  auc = round(auc_sf_all_sofa , digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf_all_sofa[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf_all_sofa[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf_all_sofa$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf_all_sofa$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf_all_sofa$ci[2], 3),
  ici = round(vals$eavg, 5),
  ici_low = round(vals$ci_lower, 5),
  ici_hi = round(vals$ci_upper, 5),
  comparison = 'VS ALL SOFA o2 Cat',
  p.value = test$p.value
))
rm(roc_df_sf_all_sofa)
```


```{r Save Tidy Models and ROC Table}
#Adjust P.Values for Multiple Comparisons in Both Tables
tidy_all <- bind_rows(tidy_models_list) |>
  mutate(
    p.adjust=round(as.numeric(p.adjust(p.value, method='BH')), 3), #Benjamini-Hochberg P-value Adjustment for Multiple Comparisons
    p.value=round(p.value, digits=3)) |>
  relocate(p.adjust, .after=p.value)
write_csv(tidy_all, paste0(project_location, '/tables/tidy_logistic_models.csv'))
rm(tidy_all)

roc_final <- roc_table |>
   mutate(
    p.adjust=round(as.numeric(p.adjust(p.value, method='BH')), 3),
    p.value=round(p.value, digits=3)) |>
  relocate(p.adjust, .after=p.value)
write_csv(roc_final, paste0(project_location, '/tables/roc_analyses.csv'))
rm(roc_final)
```


```{r Plot Curves}
overall_roc_curve <- list('PaO2/FiO2'= roc_pf, 'SpO2/FiO2'= roc_sf)
ggroc(overall_roc_curve) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_brewer(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_overall_linear.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

race_stratified_roc <- list(
  'Black-P/F'=roc_models_by_race$pf_o2_cat$black$roc, 
  'Non-Black-P/F'=roc_models_by_race$pf_o2_cat$not_black$roc,
  'Black-S/F'=roc_models_by_race$sf_o2_cat$black$roc,
  'Non-Black-S/F'=roc_models_by_race$sf_o2_cat$not_black$roc
)
ggroc(race_stratified_roc) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_race_o2_cat.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#####Repeat RACE and SOFA ROC Curve
race_stratified_roc <- list(
  'Black-P/F'=roc_models_by_race$pf_sofa$black$roc, 
  'Non-Black-P/F'=roc_models_by_race$pf_sofa$not_black$roc,
  'Black-S/F'=roc_models_by_race$sf_sofa$black$roc,
  'Non-Black-S/F'=roc_models_by_race$sf_sofa$not_black$roc
)
ggroc(race_stratified_roc) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_race_sofa.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

####################
#RESPIRATORY SUPPORT
####################

resp_stratified_roc_sf <- list(
  'IMV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_o2_cat$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_o2_cat$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_o2_cat$high_flow_nc$roc)
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_sf) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_sf_o2_cat.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

resp_stratified_roc_pf <- list(
  'IMV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_o2_cat$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_o2_cat$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_o2_cat$high_flow_nc$roc)
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_pf) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_pf_o2_cat.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

resp_stratified_roc_o2_all <- list(
  'IMV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_o2_cat$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_o2_cat$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_o2_cat$high_flow_nc$roc,
  'IMV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_o2_cat$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_o2_cat$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_o2_cat$high_flow_nc$roc
  )
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_o2_all) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_o2_cat_all.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

################
#Repeat for SOFA
#################
resp_stratified_roc_sf <- list(
  'IMV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_sofa$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_sofa$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_sofa$high_flow_nc$roc)
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_sf) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_sf_sofa.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

resp_stratified_roc_pf <- list(
  'IMV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_sofa$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_sofa$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_sofa$high_flow_nc$roc)
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_pf) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_pf_sofa.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

resp_stratified_roc_sofa_all <- list(
  'IMV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_sofa$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_sofa$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-P/F'=roc_models_by_resp$pf_sofa$high_flow_nc$roc,
  'IMV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_sofa$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_sofa$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-S/F'=roc_models_by_resp$sf_sofa$high_flow_nc$roc
  )
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_sofa_all) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_sofa_all.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

```


```{r Calibration Curves}
N_BINS <- 18

#####################################
### MAIN MEASURE - Lowest in First 24
#####################################
#PF Ratio
cal_bin <- dat_pf %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred, N_BINS)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cal_bin, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_smooth(color="firebrick2", se=F) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.015) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Mean predicted probability (bin)",
       y = "Observed Event Probability",
       title = "Calibration plot for PaO2/FiO2 (binned deciles)") +
  theme_minimal()

agg_df <- dat_pf |>
  filter(variable=='measure_value_5') |>
  group_by(value) |>
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(agg_df, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate, weight = total)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=total), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 1.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 0.5), ylim = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Predicted probability (Death/Hospice at Day 28)",
       y = "Observed Probability",
       title = "Calibration: PaO2/FiO2") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='calibration_pf_overall.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#SF Ratio
cal_bin <- dat_sf %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred, N_BINS)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cal_bin, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_smooth(color="firebrick2", se=F) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.015) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Mean predicted probability (bin)",
       y = "Observed Event Probability",
       title = "Calibration plot for SpO2/FiO2 (binned deciles)") +
  theme_minimal()

agg_df <- dat_sf |>
  group_by(value) |>
  filter(variable=='measure_value_5') |>
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(agg_df, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate, weight = total)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=total), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 1.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 0.5), ylim = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Predicted probability (Death/Hospice at Day 28)",
       y = "Observed Probability",
       title = "Calibration: SpO2/FiO2") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='calibration_sf_overall.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#####################################
### SENSITIVITY MEASURE - Median in 1st 24
#####################################
#PF Ratio
cal_bin <- dat_pf_median %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred, N_BINS)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cal_bin, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_smooth(color="firebrick2", se=F) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.015) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Mean predicted probability (bin)",
       y = "Observed Event Probability",
       title = "Calibration plot for PaO2/FiO2 (median value)") +
  theme_minimal()

agg_df <- dat_pf_median |>
  filter(variable=='median_measure_5') |>
  group_by(value) |>
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(agg_df, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate, weight = total)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=total), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 1.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 0.5), ylim = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Predicted probability (Death/Hospice at Day 28)",
       y = "Observed Probability",
       title = "Calibration: Median PaO2/FiO2") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='calibration_pf_median_continuous.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#SF Ratio
cal_bin <- dat_sf_median %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred, N_BINS)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cal_bin, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_smooth(color="firebrick2", se=F) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.015) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Mean predicted probability (bin)",
       y = "Observed Event Probability",
       title = "Calibration plot for SpO2/FiO2 (binned deciles)") +
  theme_minimal()

agg_df <- dat_sf_median |>
  group_by(value) |>
  filter(variable=='median_measure_5') |>
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(agg_df, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate, weight = total)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=total), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 1.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 0.5), ylim = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Predicted probability (Death/Hospice at Day 28)",
       y = "Observed Probability",
       title = "Calibration: SpO2/FiO2 (median)") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='calibration_sf_median_continuous.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

```
